# Notation

This page collects common notation used throughout the notes.

| Symbol | Meaning |
|---|---|
| $x$ | State vector |
| $u$ | Control input |
| $y$ | Output vector |
| $A, B, C, D$ | State-space matrices |
| $P$ | Real power |
| $Q$ | Reactive power |
| $S$ | Complex power |
| $V$ | Voltage phasor |
| $I$ | Current phasor |
